## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed IP/provenance impact for new or modified files.
- [ ] I documented third-party material in THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md (if applicable).
- [ ] I did not include secrets, private keys, or confidential customer/company data.
- [ ] I added `Signed-off-by` on all commits (DCO).
- [ ] CI checks pass.

## Provenance Declaration

For each non-trivial added/modified component, provide:

- Origin: original / adapted / copied / generated with AI / unknown
- Source URL (if external):
- License (if external):
- Evidence location (file + lines):
- Why redistribution is allowed:

## Corporate Authorization (if applicable)

- [ ] This contribution was created in a corporate context.
- [ ] My organization authorizes contribution under repository terms.
